Bhattotpala adds here that though the definition of Apasavya is the
same with respect to all planets, yet in the case of the planetary war
named Apasavya it is different i.e. it means Dr. Kern says :
"The Apasavyam or Asavyaih yuddham takes place when the interval
is somewhat less than a degree; at a greater interval there is no
conflict." Rjiputra and others speak of 15 kinds of war.

When the Bheda (occultation) type of warfare takes place,
there will be failure of rains, and discord among friends and big
families. At the Ullekha (grazing) type of war there will be danger
